content: Chapter ends are worth the Prim silver correct?
It's pretty good, not as valuable as monthly though.
Flare's guide has a comparison of pull value between packs.
But if I recall isn't it pretty skim on first few chapters?
K looks like out of the strange area since the packs were slightly different for the prelude and chap 1.
any consensus on mochette?
and her teams?
Top tier dps, lacks utility but make up with sheer amount of damage
Best partners are thais and helot
base helot? and any budget team cause thais is used by others usually
Base helot yes
Thais is good for mouch, but she don't need thais to do content

Budget team is like 

Mouch helot aigis faint/lily
Or even leigh
is mouch worth going for E3/OE, or should I just wait for Kat rerun?
Is it worth buying wolf pieces everyday for stamps?
I do that, because it's the only way to get stamps with rose scrip
I buy the other cov too
Not really
Rose script are pretty valuable later on
Mouch break point is e2
You probably want to aim for e3 if you are going for alert 5 difficulty with her
Since more damage is more damage
Oe not really needed
Is it bad for Mouchette to start nuking turn 5+
or is it just how she work
as in like she deal insane damage
I somehow did 49000 damage on turn 7
What
She can start nuking turn 1
yay then Im using her wrong
If you have helot and her exalt available
Wait so u use helot first then her exalt?
does she really need Thais, my Thais is kinda busy with other teams alr
any turn is fine but helot exalt and mouch rouse help 🫃
Usually you rouse mouch on turn 1
Then second turn you burst with helot and her exalt
Can run budget team with her
Doesn't hard requires thais like other carries
so Helot, Faint and Ramona?
Mouchette helot + 2 flex slot
I like aigis in this comp more
Will keep in mind thanks
Although is it better to use Ramona + a flex spot for Mouchette Helot or is Thais Aigis better
Is Thais overexhalt worth
Should I always be buying the Lotan shards in shop every month?
I assume Ogier and Doll are less important
Unless you desperately need Thais together with your Mouchette, you likely wouldn't need to place the tow together
Mk
None of them are really used until you +12 them, so it's up to yoy
Not particularly worth it, I have it only for aliemus overflow, you don't really use the OE effect nor do you need it
Alright thank you. Other question: Are the current rotation of wheels in the shop important at all?
I assume no in comparison to the obvious top tier wheels
Oh I do see that people like Rewinding Time
What rotation
Oh those
Rewinding time and celestial beast are both pretty good
Yeah
okay
Eventually you want to get all of them
But you can start with these 2
okay
Dreamsparks seem to be one of the more important things you can get from D-Jewels?
Yes
That's soul forge talent material
I don't really plan to play any of the characters in the current shard rotation, so its either dreamsparks or wheels lol
Yeah I've used up so much of it already on my main team
Current teams being: GMurphy/Thais/Miryam/Tulu or switch out Thais for full Lumerian
What about her wheel? Worth e3?
Thais wheel? Yes, best support wheel in game
it is veeeeeeeeeery good
Okay I'll pull it thanks
E3
game changing
Both works, just play what you feel more comfortable
Both are real fun
Usually in dzone you want to save thais for another team
Thais makes sure I get off GMurphy's exalt off as much as possible
So maybe practice full fish abit
Yeah I will eventually be building multiple teams
this game is a godsend for me right now going into the new year lol
I decided to pull more for Mouchette and got her to E2, so I've also been experimenting with
Mouchette/Ramona/Helot/Thais
I think I might be playing that team too slowly tough
though*
I feel like 4 turns in I am doing insane damage for my level
but Fish team starts popping off very fast
Really
In my experience monch team start their burst faster
As I said
I think I'm playing monch wrong
I think I need to watch a quick playguide video down the road or something
but
fish team is by far my favorite right now
Everyone's voicelines are good
Murphy is the name of my IRL daughter so I get to beat shit to death with my kid
Just hoping for an awakener named Theo so I can beat shit to death with my son
I wonder why Flare rates her so low while most people say she's good.
Flare needs a vocal coach
Flare needs to edit out his weird mouth noises its ***TRIGGERING*** my misophonia response
That sounds harsh. This is meant to be constructive criticism. I've already learned much about the game from him.
Flare rates his list based on general usuage
(I don't really know what that means)
There is a Character ingame named Theodore iirc, it's just that he is not playable currently because he hasn't || died || yet
But you can see on his whale tier list,  mouch is A
Nvm
His name is William
He just looks like a Theodore
He does look like a Theodore
He bases it alot on ease of play and potential to clear Arc 1 Content iirc
See
That's what I'm saying man
You get me
That's the only thing he doesn't base them on
Wait fr?
Else tawil won't be there at the top
I remember him going Arc 1 this and that alot
Unless I'm misremembering
If we are talking about arc 1 ease
Mouch stomp it so hard
Could just be his bias like with all of the one-sided hate on Clementine and Ultra as a whole
She should be at the top
Rs
Like, there are times where I don't even need Thais to Dupe Shining Tornados twice or use her for the Vulnerable Application
Helot Exalt into Mouchette blender Combo is enough
I feel like
Can throw in the Mouchette Posse somewhere in between and use the Strikes for good measure too
This is specific to my particular brand of silliness
but
I reaaaaally love the sound byte they use for the tentacles thwacking in Aequor
just the
THWACKTHWACKTHWACK
its very good
Yeah
People like to call it "tentacle slap"
Because of the animation that plays
As they should
And like you mentioned, the sound effects that come with it
It's just too real of a name lmao
Rs man, I wholeheartedly agree
Visual and audio sublimity
I remembered playing Tawil as a brand new player. I had no idea what I was doing at all.
Me and a friend of mine also like to call it the tentacle || hentai || realm
Because you know what lol
Yeah, Tawil especially at low investment is one hell of a torture method at play
i mained ultra tawil for all of arc 1
this is why i turned out like this
But that's literally the only thing that justified 24 being in S tier <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
Support 24 is still good
It's a dps tier list <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

Do you have a vulnerability source
If no, then run ryker

Like how gmurphy wants lemurians for high dmg or mouchette wanting helot and thais

Bluewill: Tawil, Gdoll, Caecus, Hameln.
Specifically? Not really
She's a generic aliemus support
e3  Mocchi or E2 Miryam? They are both E0
E2 Mouchette, if you really like her can invest in E3 her best WoD is Lily / Mouchette
If you have an E3 minimum GMurphy can consider investing in Myriam E2 for the standard Lemurian Comp that goes with Tulu, Goliath, Faros, etc
Gmurph is OE<:kath_cool:1447714576413233315>

content: Can check the Covenant Guide at the Mythag University Server if you'd like
I found that more clear and coherent

Each covenant piece has 4 possible substats. After reaching a certain level (45, I think), you will unlock covenant substats. Any cov piece you get after this point will automatically have subs and you will have to roll subs to give substats to  any covenants you had before this point
I can send the server link  in dms
Just lmk if you want it
Rolling subs costs 3 seals and 7500 scrips
Yh can get fairly costly
yes plz
As a new player, you’ll generally only care about the covenant set effects. You can worry about mainstats later.
+guides

- keyflare wheels
- hand size wheels
- wheels that have a big impact even on your support characters

How good is Ramona?

Pretty good all around tbh. She gives keyflare which is a very good stat and her exalt will let you pull any card from discard or draw and set it to 0. This is very nice if you have a DPS with a powerful 3 cost like mouchette.
Not that mouchette is very hard pressed for synergistic supports. Mouchette works very well with the caro realm and thais/aigis/helot as well.
